nodes.name: Aplonis
nodes.summary: Aplonis（Aplonis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Metallic starling、Yellow-eyed starling、Rennell starling等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Moluccan starling
nodes.summary: Moluccan starling（Aplonis mysolensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Moluccan starling。

nodes.name: Moluccan starling
nodes.summary: The Moluccan starling (Aplonis mysolensis) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Moluccan starling (Aplonis mysolensis) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Indonesia.
